title: <div><u>Copyediting / Content Creation</u> ($25/hr): Proofreading all written co
content:
Copyediting / Content Creation ($25/hr): Proofreading all written content to ensure it's clearly articulated, injecting clarity into all language used, and building any original content for whatever is needed to form a fully comprehensive web presence (e.g. emails, landing pages, feature articles, product description, and a wide variety of other written materials).

detail-oriented copy editor to proofread feature articles, web content and a wide variety of other written materials.
